name: ICP - Individual country price data
description_short: Individual country-level consumer price data underlying the HICP, with detailed product-level breakdowns for each EU member state. Enables cross-country price comparison at a granular level.
use_cases: How do food prices compare between Germany and Poland?
Which country has the highest energy price inflation?
What is the HICP for services in Spain compared to the EU average?
How do housing costs vary across EU countries?
